data.content: RT @TeamTrumpPRESIDENT TRUMP: Early this morning, Tulsi and I were at Arlington National Cemetery with the families of servicemembers who lost their lives in the catastrophic withdrawal from Afghanistan. Today marks the 3-year anniversary of the terrorist attack at Abbey Gate that left 13 American servicemembers dead, dozens more badly wounded, with many innocent civilians also killed and injured. We will never forget those brave warriors who made the supreme sacrifice for our country—they will live in our hearts FOREVER. And to all the Gold Star families, our gratitude is everlasting. We will honor their memory by restoring a government that puts the American People FIRST.

data.content: RT @TeamTrumpPRESIDENT TRUMP: "I also want to salute Bobby’s decades of work as an advocate for the health of our families and children. Millions of Americans who want clean air, clean water, and a healthy nation have concerns about toxins in our environment and pesticides in our food. "That is why today I am repeating my pledge to establish a panel of top experts, working with Bobby, to investigate what is causing the decades-long increase in chronic health problems and childhood diseases, including auto-immune disorders, autism, obesity, infertility, and more.""We want every child in America to grow up to live long and healthy lives."
data.contentHtml: RT @TeamTrumpPRESIDENT TRUMP: "I also want to salute Bobby’s decades of work as an advocate for the health of our families and children. Millions of Americans who want clean air, clean water, and a healthy nation have concerns about toxins in our environment and pesticides in our food. data.content: RT @TeamTrumpPRESIDENT TRUMP: "Our opponents worship the Deep State—we want to obliterate the Deep State.""Our opponents join with warmongers and neo-cons to wage endless wars overseas—we believe that America is STRONGEST when America is at PEACE.""Our opponents slander us as a threat to Democracy—meanwhile, they rig their primaries, force out Joe Biden, who got 14 million votes, in an unconstitutional coup, and appoint a nominee who never got a single vote."
data.contentHtml: RT @TeamTrumpPRESIDENT TRUMP: "Our opponents worship the Deep State—we want to obliterate the Deep State.""Our opponents join with warmongers and neo-cons to wage endless wars overseas—we believe that America is STRONGEST when America is at PEACE.""Our opponents slander us as a threat to Democracy—meanwhile, they rig their primaries, force out Joe Biden, who got 14 million votes, in an unconstitutional coup, and appoint a nominee who never got a single vote."

data.content: RT @TeamTrumpPRESIDENT TRUMP: Soon after I was nearly assassinated in Pennsylvania last month, Bobby called me to express his best wishes. He knows firsthand the risks incurred by leaders who stand up to the corrupt political establishment—he lost his father and uncle in service to our country, and Bobby himself was subject to repeated threats to his safety during the course of his campaign, while being denied protection by the Harris-Biden administration. In honor of Bobby, I am announcing tonight that upon my election, I will establish a new independent presidential commission on Assassination Attempts. They will be tasked with releasing all remaining documents pertaining to President John F. Kennedy’s assassination and other events in question, and they also will conduct a rigorous review of the attack last month in Butler.
data.contentHtml: RT @TeamTrumpPRESIDENT TRUMP: Soon after I was nearly assassinated in Pennsylvania last month, Bobby called me to express his best wishes. He knows firsthand the risks incurred by leaders who stand up to the corrupt political establishment—he lost his father and uncle in service to our country, and Bobby himself was subject to repeated threats to his safety during the course of his campaign, while being denied protection by the Harris-Biden administration. In honor of Bobby, I am announcing tonight that upon my election, I will establish a new independent presidential commission on Assassination Attempts. They will be tasked with releasing all remaining documents pertaining to President John F. Kennedy’s assassination and other events in question, and they also will conduct a rigorous review of the attack last month in Butler.

data.content: RT @TeamTrumpPRESIDENT TRUMP: Tonight, I am very pleased to welcome a man who has been an incredible champion for so many of these values we all share. For the past 16 months, Robert F. Kennedy Junior has run an extraordinary campaign for president of the United States. Had he been allowed to enter the Democrat primary, he would have beaten Joe Biden. His candidacy has inspired millions of Americans, raised critical issues that have been too-long ignored, and brought together people from across the political spectrum in a positive campaign grounded in the American values of his father, Robert Kennedy, and his uncle, President Kennedy. I believe they would both be very proud.

I believe they would both be very proud.

data.content: RT @TeamTrumpUnder President Trump:• Hispanic-American Household incomes hit an all-time high. • The Hispanic American unemployment rate hit a record low.• The Hispanic American poverty rate reached a record low.• More than 1.5 million Hispanic Americans were lifted out of poverty.• The household wealth of the median Hispanic family grew 65 percent.• The Hispanic-American high school graduation rate reached all-time high, and home ownership among Hispanics also hit a record high.
